user_query: I'm planning a road trip with my friends and we want to compare the gasoline prices in different European countries.

TaskList.description: Fetch current gasoline prices in Germany, France, Italy, Spain, and Greece.
required_inputs: country list: Germany, France, Italy, Spain, Greece

TaskList.description: Fetch current gasoline prices by state in the United States.
Compare and compile gasoline prices from Europe and the USA into a single report.
required_inputs: gasoline prices from Europe (Step 1), gasoline prices from the USA (Step 2)
